message:
feat(web): Add Vite + React 19 scaffold for web-based Phage Explorer

Bootstrap a minimal web package as the foundation for a browser-based
version of Phage Explorer, complementing the existing TUI.

New package: packages/web

Build System:
- Vite 6.0 with @vitejs/plugin-react for fast HMR
- ES2022 build target for modern browser features
- Path aliases resolving to sibling packages for code sharing
- Scripts: dev, build, preview, lint

Package Configuration (package.json):
- Name: @phage-explorer/web (private)
- React 19.0.0 + ReactDOM dependencies
- TypeScript 5.7.2 for type checking
- ESLint integration ready

TypeScript Configuration:
- tsconfig.json: Extends root config, adds Vite client types
- tsconfig.node.json: Composite config for vite.config.ts
- DOM lib included for browser APIs

Vite Configuration (vite.config.ts):
- Path aliases for all @phage-explorer/* packages:
  - core, state, renderer-3d, db-schema, db-runtime
  - comparison, data-pipeline, tui
  - @phage/wasm-compute
- React plugin enabled for JSX transformation

Application Files:
- index.html: Minimal shell with #root container
- src/main.tsx: React 19 createRoot bootstrap with StrictMode
- src/App.tsx: Placeholder scaffold with header and card layout
- src/styles.css: Dark theme foundation with:
  - JetBrains Mono monospace font stack
  - Gradient background matching TUI aesthetic
  - Responsive grid layout
  - Glassmorphism card styles

Design Notes:
- Intentionally minimal Phase 0 scaffold
- Maintains visual consistency with TUI color palette
- Prepared for shared package imports via aliases
- Ready for keyboard-first interface port from TUI

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
